scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ckb-escrow/sdk && npm run build --workspace @ckb-escrow/ccc-adapter && npm run build --workspace @ckb-escrow/app && npm run build --workspace @ckb-escrow/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ckb-escrow/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace @ckb-escrow/ccc-adapter && npm run typecheck --workspace @ckb-escrow/app && npm run typecheck --workspace @ckb-escrow/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @ckb-escrow/sdk && npm run test --workspace @ckb-escrow/ccc-adapter && npm run test --workspace @ckb-escrow/app && npm run test --workspace @ckb-escrow/frontend
scripts.pack:shared: npm run build --workspace @ckb-escrow/sdk && npm run build --workspace @ckb-escrow/ccc-adapter && npm run build --workspace @ckb-escrow/app && mkdir -p artifacts/npm && npm pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts/npm --workspace @ckb-escrow/sdk && npm pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts/npm --workspace @ckb-escrow/ccc-adapter && npm pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts/npm --workspace @ckb-escrow/app
